message:
fix: prevent Settings sidebar flickering on scroll (#8578) (#8587)

The IntersectionObserver scroll spy used multiple thresholds and updated
activeSection synchronously, creating a feedback loop: observer fires ->
sidebar re-renders -> sticky layout shifts -> observer fires again.

Fix: debounce observer callbacks (100ms) and reduce to a single threshold
so rapid-fire boundary crossings are coalesced into one state update.
The functional setActiveSection updater also skips no-op re-renders.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
